description:
You are a Trust & Safety Analyst at a travel agency responding to a bot attack of mass 1-star reviews. Your goal is to identify and suspend users with 3 or more 1-star reviews in the demodb database (URL: http://localhost:2480, User: admin, Pass: admin).

Update the Profiles class schema to include a STRING property named AccountStatus and mark all identified offenders as 'Suspended'. Additionally, create a SuspensionLog vertex class and a HasSuspensionLog edge class to document these actions. For each suspended user, create a SuspensionLog vertex with the Reason property set to 'Review Bombing' and link the user's Profile to this log via a HasSuspensionLog edge. Ensure no data is deleted and only users meeting the 3-review threshold are suspended.
